stemHtml: The purpose of the autopilot Control Wheel Steering (CWS) mode is…

options.a: to control the nose wheel steering during low visibility take off and landing.
options.b: to control the nose wheel steering during automatic landing.
options.c: To allow the pilot to manually manoeuvre the aircraft through the autopilot computer and actuators using the control wheel.
options.d: to capture and hold the altitude selected with the control wheel on the mode control panel.
